overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence from a video game depicting a foggy Louisiana bayou dock at night. The player walks along a wooden pier past gas lamps, then enters a rustic wooden workshop filled with tools and a hanging rowboat.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over foggy water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock, observing the foggy water and distant cypress trees

entered.detail: tall wooden post with warm glowing gas lamp illuminating the fog
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
calm water surface covered in thick fog reflecting the moonlight
silhouette of cypress trees with Spanish moss on the distant shore
vertical wooden posts along the dock edge for tying boats

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night at a wooden bayou dock. The camera moves forward along weathered planks, passing a warm gas lamp on the left, with foggy water and distant cypress trees visible to the right.

events.description: turning left away from the water to approach the wooden building entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the building and walking along the dock to reach the entrance

entered.detail: rustic wooden building with weathered siding and warm interior light glowing from windows
overhanging wooden roof providing shelter over the entrance area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left toward a rustic wooden building, leaving the open water behind. Moving under the porch roof, the building's weathered exterior and warm window lights become the focal point as the dock continues to the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic workshop interior with boat hanging from ceiling

events.description: entering the wooden building from the dock into the interior space

agents.ego_description: entering the workshop and looking around at the tools, shelves, and hanging boat

entered.detail: tall wooden shelving units filled with boxes and supplies along the left wall
sturdy wooden workbench with tools and materials in the center of the room
small wooden rowboat suspended from the ceiling beams
warm gas lamps mounted on the interior walls providing illumination
thick wooden beams supporting the ceiling structure
round wooden barrels stored near the right wall

segments.scene_description: Entering the building reveals a cozy workshop interior lit by warm wall lamps. The camera explores the space, showing wooden shelves, a central workbench, and a small boat hanging from the ceiling beams, with the foggy night now left outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty outdoor bayou dock into the warm, enclosed sanctuary of a rustic workshop. It begins by gliding forward along weathered wooden planks under a foggy night sky, passing a glowing gas lamp while cypress trees loom in the distance. As the camera turns left, the open water recedes and the view shifts toward the weathered exterior of a wooden building, moving under a porch roof toward the entrance. The scene then opens into a cozy interior lit by warm wall lamps, transitioning from the damp night air to a sheltered space filled with wooden shelves and a central workbench. Finally, the camera explores the room, revealing a small boat suspended from the ceiling beams as the fog is left entirely behind.
